subcommands.name: sync
subcommands.description: Manually synchronize the local vault with Dashlane

subcommands.name: read
subcommands.description: Retrieve a secret from the local vault via its path

args.name: path
args.description: Path to the secret (dl://<title>/<field> or dl://<id>/<field>)

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Execute a command with secrets injected into the environment variables (-- <command>)

subcommands.name: inject
subcommands.description: Inject secrets into a templated string or file (uses stdin and stdout by default)

options.description: Input file of a template to inject the credential into
Output file to write the injected template to

subcommands.name: password
subcommands.description: Retrieve a password from the local vault and copy it to the clipboard

options.description: How to print the passwords. The JSON option outputs all the matching credentials

args.name: filters
args.description: Filter credentials based on any parameter using <param>=<value>; if <param> is not specified in the filter, will default to url and title

subcommands.name: otp
subcommands.description: Retrieve an OTP code from local vault and copy it to the clipboard

options.description: Prints just the OTP code, instead of copying it to the clipboard

args.name: filters
args.description: Filter credentials based on any parameter using <param>=<value>; if <param> is not specified in the filter, will default to url and title

subcommands.name: note
subcommands.description: Retrieve a secure note from the local vault and open it

options.description: How to print the notes. The JSON option outputs all the matching notes

args.name: filters
args.description: Filter notes based on any parameter using <param>=<value>; if <param> is not specified in the filter, will default to title only

subcommands.name: accounts
subcommands.description: Manage your accounts connected to the CLI

subcommands.name: whoami
subcommands.description: Prints the login email of the account currently in use

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: devices
subcommands.description: Operations on devices

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Lists all registered devices that can access your account

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: De-registers a list of devices. De-registering the CLI will implies doing a "dcli logout"

options.description: Remove all devices including this one (dangerous)

args.name: device ids
args.description: Ids of the devices to remove

subcommands.name: register
subcommands.description: Registers a new device to be used in non-interactive mode

args.name: device name
args.description: Name of the device to register

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: team
subcommands.description: Team related commands

subcommands.name: credentials
subcommands.description: Team credentials operations

subcommands.name: generate
subcommands.description: Generate new team credentials

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List all team credentials

subcommands.name: revoke
subcommands.description: Revoke credentials by access key

args.name: accessKey
args.description: Access key of the credentials to revoke

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: members
subcommands.description: List team members

options.description: Output dates in human readable format

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: List audit logs

options.description: End timestamp in ms (use "now" to get the current timestamp)
Output dates in human readable format

subcommands.name: report
subcommands.description: Get team report

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: configure
subcommands.description: Configure the CLI

subcommands.name: disable-auto-sync
subcommands.description: Disable automatic synchronization which is done once per hour (default: false)

subcommands.name: save-master-password
subcommands.description: Should the encrypted master password be saved and the OS keychain be used (default: true)

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: backup
subcommands.description: Backup your local vault (will use the current directory by default)

options.description: Output directory of the backup ("." by default)
Filename of the backup ("dashlane-backup-<unix_timestamp>.db by default")

subcommands.name: logout
subcommands.description: Logout and clean your local database and OS keychain

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command
